name: Wizarr
description: An advanced invitation and management system for media servers
compose:
name: slashnode-wizarr
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/wizarrrr/wizarr:v2026.4.0
    container_name: wizarr
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
      DISABLE_BUILTIN_AUTH: 'false'
      TZ: UTC
    volumes:
      - app_data:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:5690:5690
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data:
    name: slashnode-wizarr_app_data
